fix_scope.problem: /api/mode_transition accepted SHADOW/PAUSE/RECOVERY without persistent runtime mapping
fix_scope.solution: Fail-closed: reject unsupported modes with HTTP 400

changes_summary.server.py: Added R008_RUNTIME_SUPPORTED_MODES constant; added fail-closed check in /api/mode_transition rejecting SHADOW/PAUSE/RECOVERY with HTTP 400
changes_summary.tests/test_r008_integration.py: Added 3 tests verifying SHADOW/PAUSE/RECOVERY are blocked by mode_transition API

api_contract_details: Existing /api/toggle_mode and /api/mode contracts unchanged. /api/mode_transition now returns HTTP 400 for SHADOW/PAUSE/RECOVERY instead of accepting them.
